basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Academic Support Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode has released the official notification for Academic Support Executive posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Kerala. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per the Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduation with 2 years of experience OR Graduation with 3 years of experience
qualification.details: Academic Support Executive: Post-graduation from a recognized university/institution with a minimum of two years of relevant experience in administrative and academic support areas. Graduation from a recognized university/institution with a minimum of three years of relevant experience in administrative and academic support areas. Skills: Strong communication skills in English and MS Office proficiency. Desirable knowledge in Statistics, Analytical Tools (SPSS/R/Python/Stata/Advanced Excel) and LMS/Moodle. Drafting skills.

salary_details.details: The salary for the Academic Support Executive post is Rs. 26,300/- per month. This includes Rs. 2000 as financial support for accommodation and Rs. 300/- as Telephone Allowance.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Academic Support Executive Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Support Executive position at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Academic Support Executive post is 09 June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates need either a Post-graduation with 2 years of experience or a Graduation with 3 years of experience in administrative and academic support areas to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Academic Support Executive position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Academic Support Executive role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 26,300/- per month, which includes allowances for accommodation and telephone.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Academic Support Executive post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening and shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What kind of experience is required for the Academic Support Executive role?
faq.answer: You need a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience if you have a Post-graduation, or 3 years of experience if you have a Graduation, specifically in administrative and academic support functions.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable skills for this position?
faq.answer: Desirable skills include knowledge in Statistics, Analytical Tools (SPSS/R/Python/Stata/Advanced Excel), and Learning Management Systems (LMS/Moodle), in addition to strong communication and MS Office proficiency.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Academic Support Executive position at IIM Kozhikode is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode.
